creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
You're all correct, the problem is related to x11/nvidia-driver and its driver incarnation >=364.19.

Please let me make some notes on that specific PR 201340 so that that we have some documentation what is going wrong. It might speed up the solution a bit.

But in general, I aggree, the PR is about to be closed due to "not applicable".

Regards,

Oliver Hartmann
